_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Etv5 expression was detected in in one representative murine Nf1 optic glioma model (OPG-1) but was not detected (n.d.) in the normal murine optic nerve (N) by qPCR
details: Used as normal control group (N) equivalent to wild-type mice, showed no Etv5 expression by qPCR
